<img src="https://static.scarf.sh/a.png?x-pxid=d988eb79-b0fc-4a2b-8514-6a1ab932d188" /> # TanStack React Router ![TanStack Router Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TanStack/router/main/media/header_router.png) 🤖 Type-safe router w/ built-in caching & URL state management for React!
